{"id":"bmp-egh","title":"Sync script doesn't update marketplace.json version","description":"The sync script (scripts/sync-upstream-content.ts) updates .plugin-version, package.json, and plugin.json version fields during full sync, but misses .claude-plugin/marketplace.json. This caused marketplace.json to be stuck at Beta.7.0 after the Beta.8 release. Fix: add marketplace.json to the version update logic in the sync script.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-02-11T23:36:21Z","created_by":"Pablo LION","updated_at":"2026-02-11T23:36:26Z","work_type":"mutex"}
